review_criteria: Verify git diff only changes scripts/doctor.py, scripts/verify_protocol.py, scripts/validate_workflow_state.py, and the allowed result artifacts.
Verify each legacy Python script emits the V0.8 deprecation warning to stderr from inside its __main__ execution path.
Verify the scripts continue their previous logic after emitting the warning, without deletion or MCP server modifications.
Verify no modifications were made to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state semantics.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to tasks/v0.8-m6-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.8-m6-result-review-packet.json.
